# Hyperspace Navigation: Route Alpha-7

The Alpha-7 hyperspace corridor connects the Core Worlds to the Periphery through a series of stable jump points. It is currently the shortest viable route for heavy cargo and colony vessels traveling beyond the Outer Rim.

Route specifications:
- Total distance: 47,000 parsecs (real-space equivalent)
- Jump points: 12 (including the Vega and Sirius waypoints)
- Maximum vessel mass: 2.4 million metric tons
- Navigational hazard rating: Class B (moderate — seasonal ion storms near the Crab Nebula transit)

The corridor was charted by the Imperial Survey Corps in 12,403 GE and has been in continuous commercial use since 12,411 GE. Maintenance beacons are serviced quarterly by the Spacers' Guild.
